author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Edit all 9 curriculum docs + README. Targeting: em dash overuse (replace with commas, colons, periods, or restructure), AI-polished phrasing ('at its heart', 'genuinely', 'dramatically', 'fundamentally'), overly neat parallel structures, filler hedging, repetitive sentence patterns. Preserve the author's teaching voice and clarity. Working through files one at a time.
